Latest opportunities Tech with a Twist Tech with a Twist In this section Culture Tech with a Twist Job Opportunities Menu English en English Français Menu Home Our Group Our Governance Our Governance The Board of Directors is comprised of individuals with complementary backgrounds and skills, it oversees the governance of Pernod Ricard in an ethical and transparent manner. Board of Directors The Board of Directors oversees the company's governance, in strict compliance with the rules of ethics and transparency, as well as the interests of the company, its shareholders and stakeholders. Bringing together individuals with complementary backgrounds and skills, the Board ensures that the company's strategic orientations are being implemented, with as main objective the increase of the Company’s value. The Group complies with the recommendations of the AFEP-MEDEF Corporate Governance Code. Organisation and method of operation Its 15 Directors, including 2 Directors representing the employees and 8 independent Directors, meet in average 8 times a year, in sessions directed by the Chairman of the Board, also Chief Executive Officer. The Chairman reports on the Board's work to the Annual General Meeting of Shareholders. Alexandre Ricard Chairman & Chief Executive Officer Patricia Barbizet Lead Independent Director Albert Baladi Independent Director Virginie Fauvel Independent Director Ian Gallienne Director César Giron Director Max Koeune Director Anne Lange Independent Director Jean Lemierre Independent Director Philippe Petitcolin Independent Director Kory Sorenson Independent Director Veronica Vargas Director Patricia Ricard Permanent representative of Société Paul Ricard, Director Carla Leite Director representing the employees Brice Thommen Director representing the employees Additional information Board internal rules & regulations Our gouvernance presentation Board of Directors Committees Five Committees handle subjects in the area for which they have been given responsibility and submit their opinions and recommendations to the Board: the Strategic Committee, the Nominations and Governance Committee, the CSR Committee, the Compensation Committee and the Audit Committee. Strategic Committee Alexandre Ricard Ian Gallienne Anne Lange Philippe Petitcolin Jean Lemierre Société Paul Ricard Audit Committee Philippe Petitcolin Max Koeune Kory Sorenson Compensation Committee Kory Sorenson Patricia Barbizet Ian Gallienne Brice Thommen (Director representing the employees) Nominations and Governance Committee Patricia Barbizet César Giron Anne Lange Virginie Fauvel CSR Committee Patricia Barbizet Albert Baladi Veronica Vargas Key Figures 58.3% Independent Directors 58.3% Female Directors 42.9% Non-French Directors General Management The General Management is led by the Chairman and CEO, supported by the Executive Committee. Alexandre Ricard Chairman & Chief Executive Officer Executive Committee The Executive Committee is the permanent body responsible for coordinating and directing the Group, in cooperation with the Chairman & CEO whom it assists with its responsibilities. It defines strategic objectives in line with the orientations decided by the Board of Directors, coordinates their implementation and steers the overall performance of the Group. Its members are responsible for the company's corporate functions, operational divisions and geographical regions on a global basis.
